title: Best 6 Electrical Design Software 2026: Power System Guide
description: 7 Best best electrical design compared for 2026. Analyze features, pricing, integrations and user reviews. Boost efficiency 25-40%, cut costs 20-30%. Find yo.
content:
Building electrical design software: digitalization planning of power systems

Electrical design is a basic system for building security and function. From load calculation to power distribution design, from wiring layout to lighting electrical, electrical design software helps engineers scientifically design building electrical systems. This article will comprehensively review mainstream building electrical design software to help electrical engineers master the digitalization design tools of power systems.

Corevalue of electrical design software

Electrical design software plays key functions in architectural design:

  • Load calculation: accurate calculation of building electrical load
  • Power distribution design: distribution system scheme design
  • Line design: electrical line layout design
  • Lighting electrical: lighting electrical system design
  • Drawing generation: electrical construction drawing

In-depth Review: Mainstream electrical design software

AutoCAD Electrical: a professional tool for electrical drawings

AutoCAD Electrical is the professional version of the electrical design of the AutoCAD platform.

Core Features:

  • Professional electrical symbol library
  • Electrical circuit drawing tool
  • Automatic numbering and annotation
  • Electrical drawing management
  • Report generation function

Drawing drawing:

AutoCAD Electrical's Coreadvantages are drawing drawings. The software provides professional electrical symbol libraries and drawing tools, and electrical drawing drawing is efficient.

automation:

AutoCAD Electrical can automatically number components, generate reports, and improve drawing efficiency.

Revit Electrical: BIM electrical design tool

Revit Electrical is an Autodesk Electrical design module of the Revit platform.

Core Features:

  • BIM electrical system modeling
  • Power distribution equipment layout
  • Electrical circuit three-dimensional design
  • Lighting electrical design
  • Construction drawing generation

BIMadvantages:

Revit Electrical's Coreadvantages are BIMintegration. Electrical design is integrated into the architectural BIM model and designed collaboratively with architecture, structure, and HVAC.

Three-dimensional design:

Revit ElectricalSupported three-dimensional design of electrical circuits, intuitive layout of electrical systems.

ETAP: a professional tool for power system analysis

ETAP is a professional software for power system analysis and design.

Core Features:

  • Power system analysis
  • Load calculation
  • Short circuit analysis
  • Distribution system design
  • Protection system design

System analysis:

E TAP's Coreadvantages is power system analysis. The software can perform professional analysis such as short circuit analysis and protection system design.

Professional depth:

ETAP is suitable for professional electrical design such as large-scale building power systems and industrial projects.

Electrical design software Comparison Table

Software nameDrawingSystem analysisBIM integrationautomationPrice range
AutoCAD ElectricalExcellentBasicBasicGoodSubscription-based
Revit ElectricalGoodGoodCompleteGoodintegration
ETAPBasicExcellentGoodGoodSubscription-based
Electrical DesignerGoodGoodGoodGoodSubscription-based
SKM PowerToolsBasicExcellentBasicGoodSubscription-based
EasyPowerBasicExcellentBasicGoodSubscription system

Prediction of electrical design software development trends

Intelligent electrical design

AI will assist electrical design. AI can automatically design power distribution plans and optimize line layout based on load. Electrical design efficiency will be improved.

BIM electrical deepening

Electrical design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. The electrical system will be coordinated with other systems in the building to discover design conflicts and optimize system layout.

Energy consumption analysis integration

The electrical design software will integrate the energy consumption analysis function. Electrical system design can instantly check the effectiveness of energy consumption and optimize the energy consumption method.

Real-time system simulation

Real-time electrical system simulation will become possible. Designers can instantly check the effectiveness of system operation and optimize the design plan.

Purchase suggestions

When choosing electrical design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Drawing requirements: Electrical drawings are suitable for AutoCAD Electrical
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects are suitable for Revit Electrical
  • System analysis: Large power systems require professional tools such as ETAP
  • Automation requirements: Evaluate automation function requirements
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software costs and training investment

Electrical design software is a digitalization design tool for power systems. Choose appropriate electrical design software to scientifically design building electrical systems.

step.name: Identify Your Requirements
step.text: Assess your specific needs for Best 6 Electrical Design Software. Determine key features, budget constraints, integration requirements, and scalability needs. Document your requirements to guide the selection process.

step.name: Research Available Options
step.text: Research and compare different Best 6 Electrical Design Software solutions. Review features, pricing, user reviews, and vendor reputation. Create a shortlist of 3-5 potential solutions that meet your requirements.

step.name: Evaluate Key Features
step.text: Evaluate each shortlisted Best 6 Electrical Design Software solution against your requirements. Test key features through demos or trials. Assess ease of use, integration capabilities, and support quality.

step.name: Make Your Selection
step.text: Select the Best 6 Electrical Design Software solution that best fits your needs. Consider total cost, implementation timeline, training requirements, and long-term scalability. Negotiate terms and finalize the contract.

step.name: Implement and Optimize
step.text: Implement your chosen Best 6 Electrical Design Software solution. Set up integrations, train users, and establish workflows. Monitor performance metrics and continuously optimize based on feedback and results.
